aeo_readiness.summary: The business has basic online presence but lacks critical elements for strong AEO readiness, such as reviews, schema markup, and detailed content.
quick_wins: Gather and display customer reviews on the website and Google Business Profile.
Implement schema markup to enhance search engine understanding of the business.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, FAQs, and location-specific information.

gbp_analysis.found: No Google Business Profile found or insufficient information available.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a Google Business Profile severely limits local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: No Google Business Profile exists for the business.
Lack of local search presence and customer interaction channels.

nap_citations.summary: NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) citations are inconsistent or missing across the web, affecting local SEO.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
List the business on major local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and industry-specific sites.
Monitor and update NAP information regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers seeking reliable AC services.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing schema markup and collecting customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by creating valuable content, such as blog posts on AC maintenance tips and local HVAC trends.
